initiatives.name: Prairie Abortion Fund
initiatives.description: A grassroots collective fostering mutual aid and community power through abortion access and reproductive justice in North Dakota. They coordinate direct support, resource sharing, and solidarity networks while building power through abortion funding, practical support, and creating networks of care for reproductive autonomy.

initiatives.name: CODEPINK North Dakota
initiatives.description: North Dakota chapter of CODEPINK. Women-led peace people.

initiatives.name: Prarie Action ND
initiatives.description: Comms. & advocacy organization that amplifies progressive values, messages & actions in North Dakota.

initiatives.name: Queer Resistance ND
initiatives.description: Resisting the anti-LGBTQ+ movement in North Dakota.

initiatives.name: Right to Read ND
initiatives.description: Right to Read ND is a group of North Dakotans who have come together in response to the growing movement to limit access to books and materials in our libraries and schools.

initiatives.name:
Planned Parenthood North Dakota
                            Advocate
initiatives.description: Advocating, organizing, and fighting to protect sexual and reproductive health care in North Dakota
